Overview.Description: Professional gaming intelligence engine upgraded with fuzzy matching, media optimization, and BI metrics.
Overview.Philosophy: Decoupled Architecture with Intelligent Normalization. Security-focused scrapers with rate-limit jitter.

Cycle.Security: Rate-Limit Jitter (±2–5s) applied to all external calls to mimic human behavior.

Normalization.Action: Cross-source entity deduplication based on token_sort_ratio.

PriorityLevel.name: Critical
PriorityLevel.Action: Fetch 'Free-to-Keep' deals from Epic Games Store and ITAD.
PriorityLevel.Trigger: Immediate Flash Alert if Price=0.00 and OriginalPrice>0.

PriorityLevel.name: High
PriorityLevel.Action: Concurrent fetch from IGDB, RAWG, Steam, and MiniReview.
PriorityLevel.Resilience: Soft-Fail Headless Browser Proxy (Playwright) if standard HTTP is blocked.

PriorityLevel.name: Lazy
PriorityLevel.Action: OpenCritic score fetching with Agentic Content Drafting for Mighty (80+) titles.

MediaOptimization.Worker: Pillow-driven generation of 320px thumbnails for Telegram previews.

DataSchema.Column: BI Metric: Cross-referenced IGDB Hype and OpenCritic scores.
BI Metric: Tracks API credit usage per successful discovery.
Engagement Heatmap skeleton for click-through tracking.

BusinessIntelligence.Metric: Weighted average of audience hype and critic reception.
Real-time tracking of USD investment per freebie acquisition.
Skeleton logic for platform-specific click tracking.

AgenticCapability.Action: Auto-generate viral TikTok scripts and Telegram captions.
